label: Billable Hour Pak
blurb: Deep Legal Ops & Litigation Support. Extreme labor replacement for law firms and in-house counsel.

skills.label: Corporate Minutes Formatter
skills.method: Takes the messy transcript of a board meeting and formats it into legally binding, auditable corporate minutes.

skills.label: Contract Deviation Analyzer
skills.method: Compares a returned redlined contract against the company's "standard playbook," highlighting only the risks that cross the legal department's boundaries.
trigger_examples: unblocks sales without waiting for a lawyer

skills.label: Trademark Watch Alert
skills.method: Scans global USPTO and WIPO filings daily, alerts counsel if a competitor registers a confusingly similar logo or name.

skills.label: Subpoena Pii Redactor
skills.method: Uses NLP to find and black out Social Security numbers, bank accounts, and minor names across thousands of PDF pages before opposing counsel gets them.
trigger_examples: prevents catastrophic data leaks during discovery

skills.label: Ediscovery Deduplicator
skills.method: Scans 50,000 gigabytes of corporate emails, groups identical email chains, and flags messages containing specific subpoena keywords.
trigger_examples: replaces army of junior paralegals in litigation

skills.label: Legal Hold Issuer
skills.method: Automates the process of freezing data deletion policies across AWS, Google Workspace, and Slack the moment a lawsuit is threatened.

skills.label: Deposition Transcript Summarizer
skills.method: Reads a 400-page court transcript, extracts contradictions, and builds a timeline of the witness's statements.
trigger_examples: prepares lead counsel for trial overnight

skills.label: Case Law Citation Validator
skills.method: Checks a drafted legal brief to ensure all cited cases are still "good law" and haven't been overturned by a higher court recently (Shepardizing).
trigger_examples: prevents lawyers from looking foolish in front of a judge

skills.label: Patent Prior Art Search
skills.method: Takes an engineer's rough idea and queries global patent databases and academic journals to see if the invention already exists.
